subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Qablí-Akbar! Upon thee be My glory! This is the Day of God, and all the perceptions of the world and its peoples and wisdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی قبل اکبر علیک بهائی یوم یوم الله است و جمیع ادراکات عالم و امم و حکمت
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @personal instructions
